dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4523 IS: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 111 South Tremont Street in Tremonton, Utah, as the “Sorensen-Estrada Post Office”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Curtis introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 111 South Tremont Street in Tremonton, Utah, as the Sorensen-Estrada Post Office.

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 111 South Tremont Street in Tremonton, Utah, shall be known and designated as the Sorensen-Estrada Post Office.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Sorensen-Estrada Post Office.
